channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Global markets show modest gains as oil rises amid tensions with Iran
item.description: Global financial markets showed cautious optimism on Tuesday, with US and Australian shares edging higher ahead of a critical deadline set by President Donald Trump to target Iranian power plants. The...

item.title: Seven killed in tragic head-on collision in Motherwell
item.description: On Easter Sunday, seven people tragically lost their lives in a head-on collision on the M17 road in Motherwell, Eastern Cape. The crash occurred on Monday afternoon when a Renault Triber carrying thr...

item.title: Ombudsman set to file plunder charges against Romualdez and Escudero linked to national budget irregularities
item.description: The Office of the Ombudsman is reportedly preparing plunder complaints against House Speaker Martin Romualdez and Senator Francis “Chiz” Escudero for alleged irregularities related to the national bud...

item.title: Australia’s national weather outlook for Tuesday, 7 April, 2026
item.description: The Sydney Morning Herald released the national weather forecast for Tuesday, 7 April 2026. According to the Bureau of Meteorology’s outlook, most of Australia will experience a mix of mild and wet co...

item.title: Park Area Closed as Volkswagen Vehicle Hangs on Squamish Rock Face
item.description: A section of a park in Squamish, British Columbia has been closed off after a Volkswagen vehicle shell was found precariously hanging from a rock face. The incident has drawn attention due to the vehi...

item.title: U.S. Officials Withdraw Posts After Sharing AI Image Allegedly Showing Rescued Airman in Iran Conflict
item.description: Several high-profile Republican officials in the United States encountered criticism after circulating an artificial intelligence-generated image that falsely presented an American airman being rescue...

item.title: Trump's chaotic press conference and warning of total destruction for Iran
item.description: President Donald Trump caused a stir during a press conference on 6 April 2026, where he promised to obliterate Iran's infrastructure within 24 hours unless a peace deal was reached. The event, which ...

item.title: Travellers accused of damaging Hertfordshire green belt land, prompting local outrage and legal action
item.description: Residents of Flamstead, Hertfordshire, have expressed anger after a group believed to be travellers allegedly forced entry onto privately owned green belt land near Friendless Lane over the Easter wee...

item.title: Hollywood's AI Hype Train: The Limits of Artificial Creativity in Filmmaking
item.description: At the Runway AI Summit in April 2026, Hollywood's elite discussed the role of AI in shaping the future of filmmaking, but skepticism remained, notably from Star Wars producer Kathleen Kennedy. While ...

item.title: Germany Names and Exposes Leader of REvil and GandCrab Ransomware Gangs
item.description: The German Federal Criminal Police (BKA) has publicly revealed the identity of Daniil Maksimovich Shchukin, the mastermind behind the notorious Russian ransomware gangs REvil and GandCrab. Shchukin, 3...

item.title: West Bengal Elections: Final Voter List to be Published Tonight, EC Updates Supreme Court
item.description: The Election Commission of India (ECI) has informed the Supreme Court that the final supplementary list for the Special Intensive Revision of electoral rolls in West Bengal will be released tonight. T...

item.title: Gulf city states face rising risks amid Middle East conflict
item.description: The ongoing war between the US-Israel alliance and Iran is putting the Gulf city state model under strain. Traditionally, these states have relied heavily on external security guarantees from the Unit...

item.title: Sarah Lahbati featured in Netflix reality series exploring luxury homes in Paris
item.description: Filipina actress and model Sarah Lahbati has caught attention after appearing in a Netflix reality show where she explores high-end properties in Paris, including one valued at over ₱300 million. The ...

item.title: Top 10 Tallest Buildings Around the World in 2026
item.description: In 2026, Dubai’s Burj Khalifa continues to reign as the tallest building in the world, standing at a staggering 2,717 feet with 163 floors. The race for skyscraper supremacy is still heavily dominated...

item.title: Napoli Edge AC Milan in Serie A Clash, Champions League Race Tightens
item.description: Omo, Napoli don show them pepper! The boys beat AC Milan 1-0 for Monday night Serie A action. Matteo Politano, di play well oh, na him score the only goal wey decide the match. This win mean Napoli no...

item.title: Tinubu Set For Lagos Visit To Commission Six Key Infrastructure Projects
item.description: President Bola Ahmed Tinubu go waka reach Lagos State on Wednesday for one two-day working visit wey go involve the commissioning of six important infrastructure projects wey Governor Babajide Sanwo-O...

item.title: Escalation in Lebanon as Israeli airstrikes kill civilians and displace thousands
item.description: Israeli airstrikes across Lebanon on Sunday claimed at least fifteen lives, including a local official from the Christian Lebanese Forces Party and his wife. The strikes followed Israel’s threat to ta...

item.title: Kwankwaso Welcomes Former Kano Deputy Governor Gwarzo Into ADC To Strengthen Party Structure
item.description: Rabiu Musa Kwankwaso, one-time governor of Kano State and a major figure in the African Democratic Congress (ADC), don extend warm welcome to the former deputy governor of Kano, Aminu Abdussalam Gwarz...

item.title: Scottish Woman’s Unique Gene Mutation Helps Scientists Unlock Clues to Pain and Mood Regulation
item.description: Jo Cameron, a Scottish woman who spent 65 years unaware that she could not feel physical pain or fear, was discovered to carry a rare genetic mutation known as FAAH-OUT. Her case drew scientific inter...

item.title: Mercy Dorothy Mulai Completes Pilot Training After a Decade of Challenges
item.description: Mercy Dorothy Mulai, a young woman from Uganda, turned her childhood fascination with airplanes into a real dream of becoming a pilot. From an early age, she was mesmerised by planes flying over her h...
